accepted_findings.reason: Pre-existing SkillSpector high finding in unchanged skill prose surfaced by this sources.yaml-only backfill PR.
Pre-existing SkillSpector high finding in unchanged skill prose surfaced by this sources.yaml-only backfill PR.

Reviewed intentional TM1 finding for this user-triggered rebase skill: explicit dangerous --auto mode may force-push with --force-with-lease after bypassing red-flag and verification gates. Safe --force-push and manual paths keep red-flag/verification gates, and all pushes validate and quote the current branch.

Reviewed intentional GEMINI_API_KEY lookup for the image-generation skill. The script reads this single named environment variable only when --api-key is absent, never logs it, and passes it directly to the Gemini client.
